raw_consumer_statement:
Issue : Citi denied my dispute even though I cancelled the contract the next day and the merchant issued only partial refundskeeping the entire {$7000.00} that was charged to my Citi XXXX XXXX card. 

What happened : I purchased a {$34000.00} membership contract from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) while on vacation in XXXX on XX/XX/year>. The payment was split across XXXX cards : {$20000.00} on XXXX fully refunded by Palace {$7000.00} on my debit card partially refunded by XXXX, with the remaining balance still under dispute {$7000.00} on my Citi XXXX XXXX XXXX not refunded at all I cancelled the contract the next day ( XX/XX/year> ), within the rescission/cooling-off period stated in writing by Palace. 

XXXX has claimed that the {$12000.00} they withheld is for a room upgrade ; however, I had already paid for the original room, and the contract and cancellation terms do not allow them to charge additional fees for upgrades on a cancelled membership. 

I informed Citi via email that I had cancelled the contract. Citi denied my dispute without requesting any further documentation, despite the merchant partially refunding other cards and withholding the full {$7000.00} on my Citi card for a fully cancelled contract. 

I also have submitted a complaint with PROFECO ( the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) regarding Palace Elite 's withholding of funds and the matter is currently under review. 

Key facts : I cancelled within the contracts rescission window this requires a full refund. 
The merchant partially refunded other cards this proves they recognized the cancellation. 
The merchant kept the entire Citi portion ( {$7000.00} ) and did not refund a single dollar. 
The remaining balance on my debit card is still under dispute, showing the merchant is withholding funds across multiple payment methods for a fully cancelled contract. 
The merchants withholding of {$12000.00} violates the written contract, and the room upgrade claim is not valid under the terms. 
Citi denied my dispute without appropriately reviewing the documentation or requesting additional proof. 
I received no goods or services for the {$12000.00} that XXXX kept. 


I am now financially responsible for a charge associated with a fully cancelled contract and for services that were never provided. 

Timeline : Paid {$34000.00} across XXXX cards Cancelled the next day in writing ( proof included ) Palace fully refunded XXXX ( {$20000.00} ) Palace partially refunded debit card ( {$7000.00} ), remaining balance still under dispute XXXX kept {$12000.00} total, refunded nothing to Citi Citi denied the dispute without requesting additional documentation
